title: Arweave Data Chunk
description: Payload schema for uploading a single data chunk via POST /chunk. Chunks are used to upload large data payloads for v2 Arweave transactions. Maximum chunk size is 256 KiB.

data_root.description: Base64URL encoded Merkle root of the full transaction data. Must match the data_root field in the submitted transaction header.

data_size.description: Total size of the complete transaction data payload in bytes (numeric string).

data_path.description: Base64URL encoded Merkle inclusion proof path for this specific chunk. Maximum size 256 KiB.

chunk.description: Base64URL encoded chunk data. Maximum size 256 KiB per chunk.

offset.description: Byte offset of this chunk relative to the start of the transaction data (numeric string). Maximum value 2^256.
